item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 3min Epsom's first meeting of the season rearranged after a burst irrigation system prevented
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 3min Epsom's first meeting of the season rearranged after a burst irrigation system prevented watering at track De racingpost.com 311

item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 8min Tap to leave your message on WhatsApp!
Who's your NAP of the weekend? What's your top
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 8min Tap to leave your message on WhatsApp!
Who's your NAP of the weekend? What's your top ante-post fancy this Flat season?
Get involved and tune in to The Inside Line from 9am on Saturday #SkySportsRacing De whatsapp.com 632

item.description:

item.title: TheIrishField: The Irish Field @TheIrishField · 25min This weekend in The Irish Field, Irish Grand National-winning jockey Donagh Meyle
item.description:
The Irish Field @TheIrishField · 25min This weekend in The Irish Field, Irish Grand National-winning jockey Donagh Meyler talks to Mark Boylan about bouncing back from lean years to have his best season yet
https:// eu1.hubs.ly/H0tC3gD0 1 222
